raw_formatters.description: Files using raw formatters instead of lib/format.ts

direct_toast_imports.description: Files importing useToast from shadcn or directly from sonner

hardcoded_durations.description: TSX files with className containing duration-150/200/300

console_logs.description: Files with console.log, excluding test files, app/api/ routes, and node_modules

direct_alertdialog.description: TSX files using AlertDialog, excluding ui/alert-dialog.tsx and shared/ConfirmDialog.tsx
